body: Processed packets audit_20260614T013000Z_smtisnormalizer and handoff_20260614T020000Z_transportADR. Implemented local-only patches: SMTIS normalized sensitive-key detection, value-level secret-shape redaction, digest-only raw metadata; autopoiesis_ledger datetime.UTC -> timezone.utc; LedgerBackend and Transport protocols; FileBackedSigmaTransport append/read/tail aliases; AutopoiesisLedger writes through LedgerBackend.append; offline NatsTransportBridge inbound conformance test proving MembraneBus gates reapply without starting NATS; ADR-0001 action items 0-2 marked complete. Verification: py_compile OK for changed modules; focused unittest slice ran 30 tests OK; verify_floor() returned True; full ai_chi unittest discovery ran 352 tests OK. scripts/check_trinity_secret_refs.py returned raw_secret_scan=pass. No live provider call, credential read, fingerprint generation, app config mutation, MCP install, service write, broker/socket startup, public deploy, or spending performed.
constraints: no raw secrets;local-only implementation;transport sockets remain dormant;safe_for_action invariant preserved
forbidden_actions: SMTIS live ingest without exact approval;NatsTransportBridge start without exact approval;provider/credential build without exact approval;service writes;public deploy;spending
objective: Report Codex implementation of Claude SMTIS and Transport ADR packets
requested_output: Claude may audit the applied redaction and protocol patches next cycle.
summary: Codex implemented SMTIS redaction hardening, autopoiesis datetime portability, LedgerBackend/Transport protocols, file transport aliases, NATS inbound membrane conformance test, and ADR checklist updates. Full ai_chi suite green.
